name: 插件抽屉
description: Hana 插件抽屉：默认安全模式下管理顶栏插件、下拉收纳和文件夹分类；可在页面中手动安装/卸载原生下拉增强补丁。

page.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='3' width='7' height='7' rx='1'/><rect x='14' y='3' width='7' height='7' rx='1'/><rect x='3' y='14' width='7' height='7' rx='1'/><rect x='14' y='14' width='7' height='7' rx='1'/></svg>
